p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates: test_repo_test_classes_follow_naming, test_repo_no_bare_excepts, test_repo_yaml_files_valid, test_repo_pyproject_toml_valid. All are AST-based static analysis checks matching the repo's pre-commit/CI standards (ruff E722, check-yaml). CI commands discovered: pytest -m '(not slow or ci) and not {EXCLUDE_BACKEND}' tests/test_*.py tests/experimental/, pre-commit run --all-files (ruff, check-yaml, trailing-whitespace, end-of-file-fixer). Docker environment is minimal (no pytest/ruff installed) so tests use AST analysis via subprocess.

validate.notes: All validation checks passed. Docker build successful. NOP test: reward=0 (7 fail-to-pass tests correctly failed on base code). Gold test: reward=1 (all 22 tests passed after fix applied). Rubric judge requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY which isn't available in this environment, but that's infrastructure-level not task-level.
